prompt: convert customers.csv to JSON and keep only name and email in contacts.json

messages.content: Translate the request into PlanV1 JSON. Return either {"kind":"plan","steps":[...]} or {"kind":"clarification","question":"..."}. Never emit shell.
convert customers.csv to JSON and keep only name and email in contacts.json
{"kind":"plan","steps":[{"kind":"csv_to_json","input_file":"customers.csv"},{"kind":"json_select_fields","fields":["name","email"],"output_file":"contacts.json"}]}

prompt: search all PDFs under ./contracts for renewal and write renewal_matches.json

messages.content: Translate the request into PlanV1 JSON. Return either {"kind":"plan","steps":[...]} or {"kind":"clarification","question":"..."}. Never emit shell.
search all PDFs under ./contracts for renewal and write renewal_matches.json

{"kind":"plan","steps":[{"kind":"find_files","root":"./contracts","glob":"*.pdf","max_depth":null},{"kind":"pdf_search_text","query":"renewal","output_file":"renewal_matches.json","context_chars":160}]}

prompt: find JSON files under ./exports with revenue in the path and sort the match by due_date descending into revenue_sorted.json

messages.content: Translate the request into PlanV1 JSON. Return either {"kind":"plan","steps":[...]} or {"kind":"clarification","question":"..."}. Never emit shell.
find JSON files under ./exports with revenue in the path and sort the match by due_date descending into revenue_sorted.json

{"kind":"plan","steps":[{"kind":"find_files","root":"./exports","glob":"*revenue*.json","max_depth":null},{"kind":"json_sort","field":"due_date","descending":true,"output_file":"revenue_sorted.json"}]}

prompt: convert sales.csv to JSON and count rows by region into region_counts.json

messages.content: Translate the request into PlanV1 JSON. Return either {"kind":"plan","steps":[...]} or {"kind":"clarification","question":"..."}. Never emit shell.
convert sales.csv to JSON and count rows by region into region_counts.json
{"kind":"plan","steps":[{"kind":"csv_to_json","input_file":"sales.csv"},{"kind":"json_group_count","group_by":["region"],"output_file":"region_counts.json","count_field":"count"}]}

prompt: search all PDFs under ./contracts for renewal into renewal_matches.json

messages.content: Translate the request into PlanV1 JSON. Return either {"kind":"plan","steps":[...]} or {"kind":"clarification","question":"..."}. Never emit shell.
search all PDFs under ./contracts for renewal into renewal_matches.json

{"kind":"plan","steps":[{"kind":"find_files","root":"./contracts","glob":"*.pdf","max_depth":null},{"kind":"pdf_search_text","query":"renewal","output_file":"renewal_matches.json","context_chars":160}]}

prompt: merge every PDF under ./contracts into signed_bundle.pdf

messages.content: Translate the request into PlanV1 JSON. Return either {"kind":"plan","steps":[...]} or {"kind":"clarification","question":"..."}. Never emit shell.
merge every PDF under ./contracts into signed_bundle.pdf
{"kind":"plan","steps":[{"kind":"find_files","root":"./contracts","glob":"*.pdf","max_depth":null},{"kind":"pdf_merge","output_file":"signed_bundle.pdf"}]}

prompt: convert orders.csv to JSON and keep only rows where status is paid in paid_orders.json

messages.content: Translate the request into PlanV1 JSON. Return either {"kind":"plan","steps":[...]} or {"kind":"clarification","question":"..."}. Never emit shell.
convert orders.csv to JSON and keep only rows where status is paid in paid_orders.json
{"kind":"plan","steps":[{"kind":"csv_to_json","input_file":"orders.csv"},{"kind":"json_filter","field":"status","operator":"eq","value":"paid","output_file":"paid_orders.json"}]}

prompt: find the JSON file under ./exports with employees in the path and keep only name, title, and manager in employee_directory.json

messages.content: Translate the request into PlanV1 JSON. Return either {"kind":"plan","steps":[...]} or {"kind":"clarification","question":"..."}. Never emit shell.
find the JSON file under ./exports with employees in the path and keep only name, title, and manager in employee_directory.json

{"kind":"plan","steps":[{"kind":"find_files","root":"./exports","glob":"*employees*.json","max_depth":null},{"kind":"json_select_fields","fields":["name","title","manager"],"output_file":"employee_directory.json"}]}

prompt: find JSON files under ./reports with renewals in the path and count rows by owner and stage into renewal_owner_stage_counts.json

messages.content: Translate the request into PlanV1 JSON. Return either {"kind":"plan","steps":[...]} or {"kind":"clarification","question":"..."}. Never emit shell.
find JSON files under ./reports with renewals in the path and count rows by owner and stage into renewal_owner_stage_counts.json

prompt: find the JSON file in ./exports with aging in the path and keep only rows where balance is at least 5000 in aging_over_5000.json

messages.content: Translate the request into PlanV1 JSON. Return either {"kind":"plan","steps":[...]} or {"kind":"clarification","question":"..."}. Never emit shell.
find the JSON file in ./exports with aging in the path and keep only rows where balance is at least 5000 in aging_over_5000.json

{"kind":"plan","steps":[{"kind":"find_files","root":"./exports","glob":"*aging*.json","max_depth":null},{"kind":"json_filter","field":"balance","operator":"gte","value":5000,"output_file":"aging_over_5000.json"}]}
